title: East Blue Reacts to Luffy
description: On pages 5–8, east blue reacts to luffy focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as news of Luffy’s bounty spreads across the East Blue as the crew sails toward their next destination.
scene: On pages 5–8, east blue reacts to luffy focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as news of Luffy’s bounty spreads across the East Blue as the crew sails toward their next destination.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Buggy the clown, 15 million belli.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pirate Fleet Admiral Don Krieg, 17 million Belli.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fishman pirate's Arlong the Saw, 20 million belli!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Here in East Blue, where the average bounty is 3 million,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Marine headquarters Commander BrandNew

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: These 3 pirate crews have managed to label themselves as the top-dogs, each led by captains with Bounties of over 10 million.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yet even they have all been crushed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And so, though it would seem that an initial bounty of 30 million might seem a tad excessive,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I firmly believe that it is an appropriate price to issue.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Like weeds, evil must be uprooted when they are merely buds!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Those who wish to flee, I order you to do so this instant!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: For we are the sole fortress of peace in this age of pirates, even the slightest cowardice is Unfor- Givable!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It is no crime for the masses to be weak,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: For they should be able to depend on the justice that we shoulder!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: As long as there is heinous evil prowling the seas,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It is our duty as Marines to go out and exterminate it!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: All under the name of "Absolute Justice!"

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Nahahahaha! Looks like we're wanted men now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It says 30 million Belli!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Once again, you splendidly fail to understand the gravity of your situation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't you realize this means your life is at risk!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With that bounty, I'm sure the Marine HQ as well as other strong bounty hunters will come after you...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Look! My picture's here for the whole world to see! I might be famous!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: As if. That's just the back of your head.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't be jealous now! Once we become more infamous, we might all get one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...with this, we can't afford to just loiter around in East Blue any longer.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Alright, men! Let's head straight for grand line!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Aye, Aye!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, I see an island up ahead.

summary: This part shifts the story from local East Blue battles to the wider pirate world reacting to Luffy’s new bounty.
